feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1830 201 1629 79
PT 1550 144 1406 7

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: FlowDown - Open & Fast AI
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：8,99 € → 7,99 € [7,99 € ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：7,99 €

Application Description

FlowDown is a fast, minimal AI chat app that makes working with large language models feel smooth, focused, and under your control. For guides, tips, and advanced setup help, visit flowdown.ai. Why FlowDown Lightweight and efficient Focus on your conversation, not the app. FlowDown launches quickly, stays out of your way, and keeps long chats responsive, even on busy machines. Rich formatting with Markdown Get clear, readable answers. FlowDown renders Markdown beautifully, so code blocks, bullet lists, tables, and headings in AI responses are easy to scan and use. Works with the tools you already have Connect to any OpenAI-compatible API, from major cloud providers to services running in your own home lab. If it speaks the OpenAI API, FlowDown can talk to it. Talk with text, images, and audio Show, not just tell. Paste screenshots, drop in images, or record your voice to ask questions. Use it to: - Transcribe meetings or lectures - Summarize voice notes - Ask about the content inside a photo Smooth, instant-feeling conversations Blazing-fast text rendering makes responses stream in fluidly, so you can start reading and refining your prompt without waiting for the model to finish. Automatic chat titles Stop hunting for the right thread. FlowDown names your conversations automatically based on their content, so you can quickly find that "API bug fix" or "Trip planning" chat later. Shortcut integrations Use FlowDown inside your workflows. With Shortcuts support, you can: - Send selected text from another app to your model - Generate drafts, summaries, or replies with one tap - Build custom automations that call your favourite model Privacy by design Your data is yours. FlowDown does not collect your chats. For maximum confidentiality, you can run models locally on your own machine with no external server involved. Open source and transparent Every line of code is available on GitHub. Inspect it, audit it, or adapt it for your own setups. You can see exactly how your AI client works. Free trial and open code FlowDown is fully open source, and we provide a free trial so you can confirm it fits your workflow before buying. Source code and trial builds are available at: https://github.com/Lakr233/FlowDown To try it, open the Releases section and download the latest trial version. Local models For offline, private usage, FlowDown can run models locally on Apple Silicon devices with sufficient memory. Supported model families include: Cohere, Gemma, Gemma2, Gemma3, InternLM2, Llama / Mistral, OpenELM, Phi, Phi3, PhiMoE, Qwen2, Qwen3, Starcoder2, MiMo, and GLM4. This gives you: - Full control over your data - No dependency on external servers - The ability to experiment with different open models Remote models A complimentary remote model is included so you can start chatting immediately. This starter service is best-effort, with rate limits and no uptime guarantee. For consistent, reliable use, we recommend: - Bringing your own API, or - Hosting your own inference server on local or home-lab hardware FlowDown supports all OpenAI-compatible endpoints, making it ideal for connecting to tools like Ollama and LM Studio running on your own machine for maximum privacy. Some setups require technical knowledge. If you are new to self-hosted AI or custom endpoints, please read our documentation carefully; the app can be challenging without it. We strongly recommend using the free trial before purchasing, as refunds may not be available. For advanced or enterprise use, configuration examples and best practices are documented on our website. Important note AI-generated content can be inaccurate or misleading. Always verify critical information and use FlowDown responsibly; you are responsible for how you use the output. © 2025 FlowDown Team. All rights reserved.

entry.title: AMood - 你的健康生活好伙伴
entry.id: AMood - 你的健康生活好伙伴-pt-1773095834409
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • 包年会员：22,99 € → 17,99 € [17,99 € ~ 22,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 永久会员：22,99 €
  • 包月会员：1,99 €
  • 包年会员：17,99 €

Application Description

欢迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好伙伴。无感追踪你的心理状态和身体压力，快捷查看睡眠、基础代谢、饮水、咖啡因摄入等健康指标，帮助你掌握身体动态，探索更美好的健康生活。 ◎ AMood如何帮助到你 在这个快节奏的时代，我们常常像陀螺一样不停旋转，却忽视了倾听内心的声音。疲惫与焦虑悄然袭来，却难以言说原因。我们相信，了解身心状态是每个人找到理想生活节奏的关键。AMood 正是秉持这一理念，通过更精准的分析，帮助你更好地照顾自己。例如： - 当你忙于赶项目，连续工作数小时，软件会通过手表提醒你身体活力下降，泡杯热茶，活动一下身体； - 当你开完一整天的会议，感到焦虑不安时，软件同样会提醒你情绪指数偏低，让你意识到需要暂时停下来，也许走出去晒晒太阳，散散步，都是不错的选择； - 早晨醒来感到郁闷，打开软件发现情绪指数偏低，原来昨晚的睡眠质量不佳。今天可能需要多晒晒太阳或者中午小睡一会，让身心重新焕发光彩； - 查看本周趋势，发现每次与好友一起运动后，情绪指数都会明显上扬。这或许是生活给我们的一个小提示：快乐往往藏在简单的事物中； - 当工作压力大时，查看身心状态日历，寻找最适合自己的黄金时段。在对的时间做对的事，让效率与健康齐头并进。 ◎ 核心功能 过去，压力常通过单一的 HRV 指标衡量，但生活远比数字复杂。AMood 首创双维度分析，独立监测身体压力和心理状态，帮助您更精准地识别身心变化，找到最适合的调节方式。 - 双维监测：独立追踪身体活力与情绪波动，提供更精准的分析 - 全域数据：整合睡眠、心率、体温、日照、步态等信息，全面了解身体状态 - 智能提醒：实时监测身心状态变化，适时提醒休息与调整 - 趋势洞察：帮助您发现最佳作息与工作节奏 - 习惯养成：记录运动、饮水、咖啡因摄入等行为，助力健康管理 - 联名主题：多个 IP 正版授权，增添健康管理的乐趣与互动 AMood 不仅关注单一时刻，更致力于发现生活中的规律。通过分析睡眠、心率、体温等多维数据，描绘出你独特的生命韵律。每一组数据背后，都蕴藏着提升生活品质的秘密。因为我们深信，照顾自己这段旅程，理应充满温暖与愉悦。 ◎ 苹果健康集成 AMood 与 Apple Health 集成，需要授予苹果健康的读取和写入权限。 ◎ 订阅价格和条款 我们提供一次性购买、按月和按年自动续订三种不同的购买选项。按月或按年订阅的说明：确认并支付后，将通过你的苹果 iTunes 账号自动续订。扣费成功后，顺延一个订阅周期。若需退订，请在当前订阅期结束前至少24小时内，手动在 iTunes / Apple ID 设置管理中关闭自动续费功能。试用期内，如不取消订阅，则会在试用期结束时自动开通订阅并扣款。本服务由您自助选择是否取消，若您选择不取消，将为您开通下一个计费周期的续费服务。 ◎ 隐私保护 用户健康数据仅储存在本地以及用户所属的iCloud中。 ◎ 免责声明 AMood不是医疗设备，不能用于诊断、治疗、预防疾病或医疗状况，所提供的所有信息和建议不可以被视作医疗建议或诊断，请勿替代专业的诊断和治疗。因此，如果您担心自己的身体和(或)心理健康，请咨询医生。 ◎ 用户协议和隐私条款 用户协议 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use 隐私条款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Genius Scan Enterprise - PDF
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Genius Scan Ultra：44,99 € → 5,99 € [5,99 € ~ 44,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：59,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Genius Scan Ultra：5,99 €
  • Ponta super grande：9,99 €
  • Doação generosa：2,99 €
  • Pequena doação：0,99 €

Application Description

O Genius Scan é um scanner de bolso. Digitalize rapidamente seus documentos em qualquer lugar e exporte-os como arquivos JPEG ou PDF de várias páginas. *** Apple App of the Week *** mais de 20 milhões de usuários *** milhares de pequenas empresas *** Posicione qualquer documento em frente à câmera do seu dispositivo: nosso aplicativo digitalizador reconhecerá o papel contra o fundo, cortará sua imagem e limpará o resultado. Você obterá uma digitalização nítida e legível. A digitalização em lote permite que você digitalize dezenas de páginas em apenas alguns segundos. Ferramentas poderosas ajudam a organizar, compartilhar ou arquivar seus documentos. "Na próxima vez que você planejar viajar, não se esqueça de baixar uma cópia do Genius Scan para facilitar sua vida e a do departamento de contabilidade." - AppPicker.com "Os aplicativos de câmera não foram projetados para digitalizar textos de perto, mas o Genius Scan sim." - The Guardian == ENTERPRISE EDITION == Pacote Genius Scan+ Premium: - Todos os recursos premium do Genius Scan+ (indicados com + abaixo), prontos para usar (sem necessidade de atualização). Configuração gerenciada: - Implantação em frotas de dispositivos por uma ferramenta MDM - Definição prévia das configurações do aplicativo por usuário (por exemplo, definir endereço de email padrão, credenciais de WebDAV/FTP) - Controle de quais aplicativos e serviços para os quais os usuários podem exportar documentos - Sem anúncios == PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS == Digitalização inteligente: - Detecção de documento e remoção de fundo - Correção de distorções - Remoção de sombras e limpeza de imperfeição - Filtros (preto e branco, quadro branco, foto) - Digitalização em lote Criação e edição de PDF: - Mescla e divisão de documentos - Criação de PDF multipáginas - Importação de fotos e PDF Segurança e privacidade: - Processamento de documentos no dispositivo + Face ID + Criptografia de senha no PDF Organização de documentos: - Identificação de documentos - Pesquisa de metadados e conteúdo + Esquemas personalizados de nomenclatura (Smart Document Names) + Backup e sincronização multidispositivos da Genius Cloud (assinatura em separado) Exporta: - Email + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. + Qualquer serviço compatível com WebDAV, como Citrix ShareFile, NextCloud, ownCloud, Synology, Yandex. + Exportação automática de fundo OCR (Reconhecimento de texto): + Extração de texto + Criação de PDFs pesquisáveis + Leitura de cartões de visita e criação de contatos == QUEM SOMOS == É no coração de Paris, na França, que The Grizzly Labs desenvolve o Genius Scan. Nos orgulhamos por criarmos aplicativos que ajudam milhões de usuários em todo o mundo, e que nos colocam nos mais altos padrões de qualidade e privacidade. Entre em contato conosco @thegrizzlylabs se tiver alguma dúvida. == PREÇOS E LEGAIS == Você pode se inscrever no Genius Cloud para backup e sincronização. Nesse caso, a loja da Genius Scan exibe a duração e o preço de cada assinatura, atualizados no momento da compra. O pagamento será cobrado na conta do iTunes quando o pedido for confirmado. As assinaturas são renovadas automaticamente, a menos que a renovação automática seja desativada até 24 horas antes do final do período atual. Gerenciar assinaturas, desative a renovação automática nas configurações da conta do iTunes. https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

entry.title: Cat Quest II
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

CAT QUEST II é um RPG de ação de mundo aberto 2D em um reino fantástico de cães e gatos. Sob a ameaça de uma guerra contínua entre os gatos de Felingard e as forças do Império de Lupus, CAT QUEST II conta a história de dois reis, unidos contra suas vontades, em uma jornada repleta de descobertas miauravilhosas para reclamar seus tronos. Jogue como cão e gato e explore os reinos sozinho ou com seus amigos! Aventure-se em um mundo repleto de magia e monstros esquisitos e embarque nessa miauventura única! Com o sucesso do aclamado CAT QUEST, os Gentlebros voltam ao mundo de Felingard para superar a experiência do primeiro jogo, com mais magias explosivas, opções de armas mais abrangentes, uma mecânica de alternância de personagens fantástica e modo cooperativo local! Experimente - Uma história inédita no mundo de Felingard — e novos locais! - Novas mecânicas de alternância e cooperação. Jogue como gato e cão, sozinho ou com seus amigos! - Novos tipos de armas – Torne-se um mestre de espadas, cajados e muito mais e seja um guerreiro foformidável! - Mais magias para miaussacrar seus inimigos. - Novas habilidades passivas, com atributos que podem ser misturados e combinados em possibilidades infinitas! - Masmorras emocionantes e diversificadas com novas armadilhas e obstáculos, garantindo que cada aventura seja cheia de descobertas inéditas! - Embarque em inumeráveis missões secundárias, cada uma com sua história única que expande o universo e a mitologia de CAT QUEST! Comece hoje sua grandiosa miauventura!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Farming Simulator 20
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • 1'000'000 Coins：2,99 €
  • 200'000 Coins：0,99 €
  • 500'000 Coins：1,99 €

Application Description

"Entra no mundo empolgante da agricultura com o Farming Simulator 20! Colhe muitas colheitas diferentes, trata do teu gado constituído por porcos, vacas e ovelhas, e cavalga nos teus cavalos, o que te permitirá explorar a imensa terra à volta da tua quinta de forma inédita. Vende os teus produtos num mercado dinâmico para ganhares dinheiro que poderás investir em maquinaria e na expansão da tua quinta. No Farming Simulator 20, controlas mais de 100 veículos e ferramentas criados fielmente das marcas líderes do mercado. Pela primeira vez nas plataformas móveis, terás à disposição a John Deere, a maior empresa de maquinaria agrícola do mundo. Trabalha com outras marcas famosas como a Case IH, a New Holland, a Challenger, a Fendt, a Massey Ferguson, a Valtra, a Krone, a Deutz-Fahr e muito mais. O Farming Simulator 20 apresenta um novo ambiente norte-americano, onde poderás desenvolver e expandir a tua quinta. Desfruta de muitas atividades agrícolas empolgantes, incluindo novas máquinas e colheitas, como o algodão e a aveia. O Farming Simulator 20 vem com os seguintes recursos: • Usa mais de 100 veículos e ferramentas realistas de alguns dos maiores fabricantes agrícolas • Semeia e colhe colheitas diferentes: trigo, cevada, aveia, canola, girassol, soja, milho, batata, beterraba-sacarina e algodão • Alimenta as tuas vacas e ovelhas para produzires e venderes leite e lã • Cuida dos teus cavalos e monta neles para explorares livremente o mundo à volta da tua quinta • Novos gráficos 3D exibem ainda mais detalhes das tuas máquinas e do ambiente norte-americano. • A vista da cabina permite-te conduzir os teus veículos de uma forma ainda mais realista do que dantes"

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Onyx Magic
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Onyx Print：99,99 € → 59,99 € [59,99 € ~ 99,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：69,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Onyx Print：59,99 €
  • 100 Onyx Credits：19,99 €

Application Description

Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data. Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera. For example: — Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet. — Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal. — Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought. — Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal. — Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye. — Change the time on a photo of a clock. — Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier. ...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it. Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice. * Variable Delayed Input Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken. * Cutting Edge Technology Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely. * Create Unlimited Effects Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took. * Your Integrations. Their Camera The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket. * Invisible, Advanced Technology As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous. * Third Party Integrations Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including: — Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input — Native voice input — Native clock swipe input — WebFX's Wrist Gestures — WikiTest — PeekSmith — Bridge ...and any compatible third-party app. # Introducing: Onyx Print Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world. # Produce Physical Photographs Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending. # Dynamic Prompting Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx. Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match. # Use Your Own Photos You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal. # Works With Other Apps Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it. Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future. Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits. Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

entry.title: This War of Mine
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：17,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 17,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • The Little Ones：1,99 €

Application Description

"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK "This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps "I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer Em "This War of Mine" você não irá jogar com um soldado de elite, mas sim com um grupo de civis tentando sobreviver em uma cidade sitiada, lutando contra a falta de alimentos, medicamentos e constante perigo de franco-atiradores e catadores hostis. O jogo oferece uma experiência de guerra vista de um ângulo inteiramente novo. O andamento do jogo "This War of Mine" se dá pelos ciclos, dia e noite. Durante o dia franco-atiradores irá impedi-lo de sair de seu abrigo, então seu objetivo será: manter seu abrigo seguro, construir melhorias, negociar com catadores e/ou vizinhos e cuidar de seus sobreviventes. À noite, você selecionará um de seus civis para ir coletar suprimentos nos locais indicados no mapa, esses itens coletados irão ajudar você e seu grupo a permanecerem vivos. Tome decisões de vida ou morte seguindo a sua consciência. Tente proteger todos de seu abrigo, ou então, se necessário, sacrifique alguém para a sobrevivência da maioria. Durante a guerra, não há nenhuma decisão boa ou ruim. Somente a vontade de sobreviver. Quanto mais cedo você entender isso, melhor. This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition Dois anos já se passaram desde o lançamento global de This War of Mine, e ainda estamos expandindo a experiência do jogo. Este novo DLC grátis, criado especialmente para a Edição de Aniversário, adiciona novos personagens, novos locais para explorar e, o mais importante: um final inédito, que leva a uma nova conclusão do jogo. No entanto, o dilema continua o mesmo: o quão longe você iria para proteger seus entes queridos? This War of Mine: • Inspirado em fatos reais • Controle seus sobreviventes e gerencie seu abrigo • Armas artesanais, álcool, camas ou fogões. Algo que ajude você a sobreviver • Tome decisões. Uma experiência emocionalmente difícil e muitas vezes implacável • Clima e personagens aleatórios, cada vez que você começar um novo jogo • Estilo esfumaçado para complementar o tema do jogo PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: LaxtTime - Remember Last Time
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Premium Lifetime：19,99 € → 8,99 € [8,99 € ~ 19,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Premium Annual：9,99 €
  • Premium Lifetime：8,99 €
  • Premium Lifetime-Early Bird：19,99 €
  • Premium Monthly：0,99 €

Application Description

LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life. If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them. #For example, you can record The last time you cleaned the kitchen The last time you meditated The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping... LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set. It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters. #Features [Record Last Occurrence] LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute. If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to. [Repeat Reminders] LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets. You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time. Simple design, appropriate reminders. [Schedule Management] LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule. [Data Statistics] LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information. At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life. [Flexible Recording] LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values. You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts. You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]... [Clean UI] LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need. [Rich Personalization] LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records. At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience. [Practical Widgets] Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays. [Heat Map] Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns. [Membership Instructions] Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features. --- After confirming the purchase and payment, your iTunes account will automatically renew the subscription. The Apple iTunes account will charge within 24 hours before the expiration date. Once the payment is successful, the subscription period will extend by one subscription period. To cancel the renewal, please manually turn off the auto-renewal feature in the iTunes/AppleID settings at least 24 hours before the current subscription period ends. During the trial period, if the iTunes account does not cancel the subscription, it will automatically start the subscription and charge at the end of the trial period. Any unused trial period will be forfeited after purchasing the subscription. This service allows you to choose whether to cancel; if you choose not to cancel, the renewal service for the next billing period will start automatically. [Privacy policy] (a) https://merciful-sugar-3e6.notion.site/Laxt-Time-Privacy-7b76083d34d545abb8a59efe25c001f7 (b) https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/ [Terms of service] (a) https://merciful-sugar-3e6.notion.site/Terms-of-service-08c6aecd3d5b4e6f8c91adb04f770826?pvs=74

Application Screenshot

iPhone
